languages.text: {n}Ксенос медленно кивает, протяжно выпевая слова своего странного языка. Скрежет сервитора-переводчика вторит им.{/n} "Сколь... удовлетворительно... отмщение... после бегства... расхитителя".

{n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."
languages.original_text: {n}Ксенос медленно кивает, протяжно выпевая слова своего странного языка. Скрежет сервитора-переводчика вторит им.{/n} "Сколь... удовлетворительно... отмщение... после бегства... расхитителя".

traits.locale_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

{n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

{n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

languages.text: {n}异形缓缓点头，刻意拖长它那怪异语言的音节。阐释器机仆的嘎吱声与之呼应：{/n}“在劫掠者……逃窜后……复仇……令人无比满足。”
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

traits.locale_text: {n}异形缓缓点头，刻意拖长它那怪异语言的音节。阐释器机仆的嘎吱声与之呼应：{/n}“在劫掠者……逃窜后……复仇……令人无比满足。”

languages.text: {n}El xenos asiente lentamente mientras pronuncia las palabras de su extraño idioma, a la vez que el chirrido del servidor dilucidador las repite:{/n} «La venganza... tras la huida del... saqueador... digna de admiración».
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

traits.locale_text: {n}El xenos asiente lentamente mientras pronuncia las palabras de su extraño idioma, a la vez que el chirrido del servidor dilucidador las repite:{/n} «La venganza... tras la huida del... saqueador... digna de admiración».

languages.text: {n}Le xénos hoche lentement la tête, faisant traîner les mots de sa langue étrange. Le grincement du servitor élucidateur les reprend comme un écho :{/n} « La... vengeance... satisfaction... suite à la fuite du... pillard. »
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le xénos hoche lentement la tête, faisant traîner les mots de sa langue étrange. Le grincement du servitor élucidateur les reprend comme un écho :{/n} « La... vengeance... satisfaction... suite à la fuite du... pillard. »

languages.text: {n}Zeno, yavaşça başını sallayıp tuhaf dilinin kelimelerini uzatıyor. Aydınlatıcı hizmetörün gıcırtısı onları yankılıyor.{/n} "Yağmacının... Kaçışından sonra... İntikam... O kadar... Tatmin ediciydi ki."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zeno, yavaşça başını sallayıp tuhaf dilinin kelimelerini uzatıyor. Aydınlatıcı hizmetörün gıcırtısı onları yankılıyor.{/n} "Yağmacının... Kaçışından sonra... İntikam... O kadar... Tatmin ediciydi ki."

languages.text: {n}Der Xenos nickt langsam und ergreift in seiner seltsamen Sprache das Wort. Die knirschende Übersetzung des Elucidator-Servitors gleicht einem Echo:{/n} "Wie ... befriedigend ... Rache ... nach der Flucht der ... Plünderer."
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Xenos nickt langsam und ergreift in seiner seltsamen Sprache das Wort. Die knirschende Übersetzung des Elucidator-Servitors gleicht einem Echo:{/n} "Wie ... befriedigend ... Rache ... nach der Flucht der ... Plünderer."

languages.text: {n}異形の者はゆっくりと頷き、奇妙な言語をゆっくりと口にする。エリュシダトールのサーボがそれを繰り返す。{/n}「逃げる略奪者... 逃げる略奪者... 満足... 満足... 満足...」
languages.original_text: {n}The xenos nods slowly, drawing out the words of its strange language. The grinding of the Elucidator servitor echoes them:{/n} "How... satisfying... vengeance... after the flight of the... plunderer."

traits.locale_text: 異形の者（Xeno）はゆっくりと頷き、奇妙な言語をゆっくりと口にする。エリュシダトール（Elucidator）のサーボがそれを繰り返す。{n}「逃げる略奪者... 逃げる略奪者... 満足... 満足... 満足...」{/n}
